task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Partial implementation with critical issues: (1) Uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY format; (2) Missing explicit logic to wrap user turns with [INST]/[/INST] markers, prepend system messages to first user turn, and append </s> after assistant turns - relies on direct template application instead; (3) Parser logic (literal + rest) doesn't clearly implement the Mistral Instruct v3 specific formatting requirements. Positive: Auto-detection correctly distinguishes from Ministral 3 via [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence, LOG_DBG call present, handler dispatched correctly, no existing code modified.
